hooks.command: mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/logs" && jq -c --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" '{ts: $ts, tool: "Bash", cmd: (.tool_input.command // ""), desc: (.tool_input.description // ""), out: ((.tool_response.output // .tool_response.stdout // "") | tostring | .[0:400])}' >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/logs/actions.jsonl" 2>/dev/null || true

mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/logs" && jq -c --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" '{ts: $ts, tool: (.tool_name // "unknown"), file: (.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // "")}' >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/logs/edits.jsonl" 2>/dev/null || true
